name: Earthbound Prisoner Line Walker
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>縛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>囚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ライン・ウォーカー
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Earthbound Prison" or "Harmonic Synchro Fusion" from your Deck or GY to your hand. If you control a Level 6 or higher "Earthbound" monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck; shuffle that face-up Effect Monster into the Deck, then your opponent can Special Summon 1 monster with the same name from their Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Earthbound Prisoner Line Walker" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Earthbound Prison" or "Harmonic Synchro Fusion" from your Deck or GY to your hand. If you control a Level 6 or higher "Earthbound" monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck; shuffle that face-up Effect Monster into the Deck, then your opponent can Special Summon 1 monster with the same name from their Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Earthbound Prisoner Line Walker" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Earthbound Prison" or "Harmonic Synchro Fusion" from your Deck or GY to your hand. If you control a Level 6 or higher "Earthbound" monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck; shuffle that face-up Effect Monster into the Deck, then your opponent can Special Summon 1 monster with the same name from their Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Earthbound Prisoner Line Walker" once per turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Extra Deck to your opponent's field
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
